Option 0 - Global Parameters
Projection   : WGS84
Image        : DistanceBatch1.mat
Boundary     : 
ShearModulus : 3e11      #dyne/cm2
IM           : 0
im           : 
MaxDistance  : 500
MagDiscrete  : gauss 10
Sigma        : overwrite 0
PCE          : shuffle MC 500
IM1          : 0.01
IM2          : 1
Spatial      : 
Spectral     : 
SourceDeagg  : on
Clusters     : off 100 1

Option 1 - Logic Tree Weights
Geom Weight : 1
Gmpe Weight : 1
Mscl Weight : 1 

Option 2 - Source Geometry
geometry 1 # Ztor = 15, W = 15*sqrt(2), L = 10, dip =-45° many nodes
#area1 S1 crustal strike-slip wc1994 0 1 | 45 25 40  2  1 0   rigid | -71 -30   -70.8963583077425 -30 
area2  S1 crustal strike-slip wc1994 0 1 | 90 45 | 10 21.213 | 2.01 2 | -71 -30 -25

Option 3 - GMPE Library
gmm Sadigh97 Sadigh1997 strike-slip

Option 4 - GMPE GROUPS
gmmgroup Sadigh1997 1

Option 5 - MAGNITUDE SCALING RELATIONS
seismicity 1
delta S1 NM 2 8.0
